body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/orders/budget-occupy 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/orders/budget-occupy 
 ## 接口描述 
月结订单占用预算接口，通过传入订单关键信息进行预算占用，返回占用结果。
往返、多人订票的场景需要进行拆单处理（即与订单保存api拆单逻辑保持一致），每笔数据的orderUniqueId不可重复，且退改签订单数据需要传对应的原单的orderUniqueId（通过parentOrderUniqueId字段传输） 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bookEmpNumber","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"number001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bookEmpName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%AE%9A%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%BC%A0%E4%B8%89","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"orderUseEmpDTOList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"useEmpNumber","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"number001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"useEmpName","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%BC%A0%E4%B8%89","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0","exampleValue":"FENGYI_SHANGLV","desc":"%20%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productType","required":true,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"FLIGHT","desc":"%20FLIGHT%EF%BC%9A%E6%9C%BA%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%9B%0AHOTEL%EF%BC%9A%E9%85%92%E5%BA%97%EF%BC%9B%0ATRAIN%EF%BC%9A%E7%81%AB%E8%BD%A6%EF%BC%9B%0AMEAL%EF%BC%9A%E9%A4%90%E9%A3%9F%EF%BC%9B%0ACAR%EF%BC%9A%E6%89%93%E8%BD%A6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderType","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"C","desc":"%20N%EF%BC%9A%E9%A2%84%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%0AT%EF%BC%9A%E9%80%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%8D%95%0AC%EF%BC%9A%E6%94%B9%E7%AD%BE%E5%8D%95"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderUniqueId","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","exampleValue":"2025212001","desc":"%20%E9%9C%80%E7%A1%AE%E4%BF%9D%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E6%80%A7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"parentOrderUniqueId","required":false,"label":"%E5%8E%9F%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","exampleValue":"2025211001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"thirdOrderId","required":true,"label":"%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"BUDGET-002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"thirdParentOrderId","required":false,"label":"%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"BUDGET-001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"thirdOriginOrderId","required":false,"label":"%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E5%8E%9F%E5%A7%8B%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"BUDGET-001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"relatedApplyBillId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024073003879491","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderCreateTime","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2025-02-11%2017%3A06%3A00","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"amount","required":true,"label":"%E4%BA%A4%E6%98%93%E6%80%BB%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"24.00","desc":"%20%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E4%B8%A4%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"excludeServiceFee","required":true,"label":"%E4%B8%8D%E5%90%AB%E6%9C%8D%E5%8A%A1%E8%B4%B9%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"20.00","desc":"%20%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E4%B8%A4%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"serviceFee","required":true,"label":"%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%9C%8D%E5%8A%A1%E8%B4%B9","exampleValue":"4.00","desc":"%20%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E4%B8%A4%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"refundFee","required":true,"label":"%E9%80%80%E7%A5%A8%E6%89%8B%E7%BB%AD%E8%B4%B9","exampleValue":"0.00","desc":"%20%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E4%B8%A4%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"changeFee","required":true,"label":"%E6%94%B9%E7%AD%BE%E6%89%8B%E7%BB%AD%E8%B4%B9","exampleValue":"0.00","desc":"%20%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E4%B8%A4%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sceneName","required":false,"label":"%E5%9C%BA%E6%99%AF%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%87%BA%E5%B7%AE","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"null","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderUniqueId","required":false,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","exampleValue":"2025212002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOccupyFlag","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E6%9C%AA%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%8C1-%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8C2-%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOccupyFailReason","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%94%B9%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%B7%B2%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%EF%BC%8C%E6%97%A0%E6%B3%95%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8","desc":""}}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
[
    {
        "bookEmpNumber": 6666666,
        "bookEmpName": "张三",
        "orderUseEmpDTOList": [
            {
                "useEmpNumber": 6666666,
                "useEmpName": "张三"
            }
        ],
        "platform": "FEIHEAIR",
        "productType": "FLIGHT",
        "orderType": "N",
        "orderUniqueId": 2025212002,
        "parentOrderUniqueId": null,
        "thirdOrderId": "BUDGET-002",
        "thirdParentOrderId": null,
        "thirdOriginOrderId": null,
        "relatedApplyBillId": null,
        "orderCreateTime": "2025-02-11 17:06:00",
        "amount": 24.00,
        "excludeServiceFee": 20.00,
        "serviceFee": 4.00,
        "refundFee": 0.00,
        "changeFee": 0.00,
        "sceneName": null
    }
]
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": null,
    "data": [
        {
            "orderUniqueId": "2025212002",
            "budgetOccupyFlag": "0",
            "budgetOccupyFailReason": "改订单已成功占用预算，无法重复占用"
        }
    ]
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- | 
  | 200 | 成功 |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/travel/orders/budget-occupy

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/travel/orders/budget-occupy

接口描述

月结订单占用预算接口，通过传入订单关键信息进行预算占用，返回占用结果。 往返、多人订票的场景需要进行拆单处理（即与订单保存api拆单逻辑保持一致），每笔数据的orderUniqueId不可重复，且退改签订单数据需要传对应的原单的orderUniqueId（通过parentOrderUniqueId字段传输）

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bookEmpNumber","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"number001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bookEmpName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%AE%9A%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%BC%A0%E4%B8%89","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"orderUseEmpDTOList","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"useEmpNumber","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"number001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"useEmpName","required":false,"label":"%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%BC%A0%E4%B8%89","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platform","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0","exampleValue":"FENGYI_SHANGLV","desc":"%20%E4%B8%89%E6%96%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productType","required":true,"label":"%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"FLIGHT","desc":"%20FLIGHT%EF%BC%9A%E6%9C%BA%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%9B%0AHOTEL%EF%BC%9A%E9%85%92%E5%BA%97%EF%BC%9B%0ATRAIN%EF%BC%9A%E7%81%AB%E8%BD%A6%EF%BC%9B%0AMEAL%EF%BC%9A%E9%A4%90%E9%A3%9F%EF%BC%9B%0ACAR%EF%BC%9A%E6%89%93%E8%BD%A6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderType","required":true,"label":"%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"C","desc":"%20N%EF%BC%9A%E9%A2%84%E8%AE%A2%E5%8D%95%0AT%EF%BC%9A%E9%80%80%E7%A5%A8%E5%8D%95%0AC%EF%BC%9A%E6%94%B9%E7%AD%BE%E5%8D%95"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"orderUniqueId","required":true,"lab
